# Building Administration Webapp

## Project
Next.js (React + TypeScript) building administration webapp.

## Features
- Dashboard overview
- Tenant management
- Unit/room inventory
- Maintenance requests
- Payments & invoices

## Stack
- Next.js 14+ with App Router
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS

## Conventions
- Use App Router (`app/` directory)
- Components in `components/`
- Keep pages thin, logic in components
